race.description: Wolf Blass, The Man, Hahndorf Museum Hcp (56)
race.comment: FLYWAY (1) is desperate to break through soon on the back of two consecutive minor placings. Strips rock-hard fit and only needs to hold his form to be right there again. Leading player. CHANCE TAKEN (4) got too far back first-up but did warm nicely late. Is drawn to get back again but can cause a late scare if the tempo is genuine. HARLEY'N'ROSE (7) returns short of a preferred trip but is a handy type on his day and strips fitter for two trials. Right in the mix on best form. SUIT OF WANDS (8) will finds this a bit easier third-up and trialled well with 34 days between runs. Watch for sharp improvement.
